data.content: Fixed the flaky update integration test. The stub release server's TcpListener was set to non-blocking mode for graceful shutdown, but accepted TcpStream connections inherited this setting, causing handle_connection to panic with WouldBlock when reading the HTTP request. Fix: explicitly call set_nonblocking(false) on each accepted stream before reading. All 109 tests pass (8 unit + 18 CLI integration + 4 update integration + 79 loom-core). Branch: loom-5a3c-fix-update-tests pushed to origin.
